package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for service_method_handles_pagination_or_query_parsing: Services that parse page, sort, filter, or URL values that should already be normalized at the transport boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule171NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule171NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule171NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario171Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule171NegativeService, input Rule171NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
